group_1.textRight: Gods, huh...

group_1.textLeft: It is quite a large pill to swallow. I wouldn't be@surprised if you don't buy into it.

group_1.textRight: I...don't know about any of that "god" stuff, but...
You're aiming for a world where everyone has to@at least accept...
...that Magical Girls are superior@to ordinary humans, right?
And if you're saying your goal is to put Magical Girls@at the top of the food chain...
Then I think we're heading in the same direction...
My thoughts exactly.

group_1.narration: "If I were to become a god..."
"As you told me,@I may be able to use my power@as a Diviner to steer humans@away from evil."
"I won't have to be scared anymore,@because I'll have the power@to create an equal world@free from exploitation."
"I can punish the people of Kamihama@and force them to repent."

group_1.textRight: Mm?
Perhaps this is greedy of me, but...
Like Yakumo, I too want to punish the townsfolk.
Like the Third Sister, I want equality.
And like Tokime, I want to lead mankind.
However, I do not intend to commit myself@to righteousness.
What I seek is to become an existence that will@bring people together.
For example... Let's see...
An avatar of absolute terror, reigning as the@enemy of the masses.
That is what I must become.
To that end, I think it will be necessary to paint over@the history of Kamihama.

group_1.textLeft: Greed is a good thing. Once we get to the top,@you can have it all...
By exercising your divine right as a god.

group_1.textRight: Even so, there is one thing I'm concerned about.
I'm not sure how to put this, since you're the one@briefing me, but...

group_1.textLeft: That's not like you. Say whatever you please.

group_1.textRight: Your grandiose idea of spreading Magical Girl@supremacy...
I just can't see the Neo-Magius achieving that@in its current state.
That's what I was wondering about.
If we call ourselves "gods", most would laugh us@out of the room...

group_1.textCenter: Probs because this cutie's not here?

group_1.textRight: [chara:101601:effect_emotion_surprise_0][se:7226_shock]...?!
